prompt: Extract the format toolbar section from src/components/SidebarRight.tsx into a new component. The section is the sr-toolbar div (contains the text colour buttons and alignment buttons). Create TileFormatToolbar in src/components/sidebar_right/ with its own CSS file.
assertions: TileFormatToolbar.tsx exports a function named TileFormatToolbar
TileFormatToolbar.tsx defines SquareOutlineIcon, SquareFilledIcon, AlignLeftIcon, AlignCenterIcon (SVG functions that were previously in SidebarRight.tsx)
TileFormatToolbar.tsx has props: selectedTile and onEditTile
SidebarRight.tsx renders <TileFormatToolbar instead of the old sr-toolbar div
SidebarRight.tsx no longer defines SquareOutlineIcon, SquareFilledIcon, AlignLeftIcon, AlignCenterIcon
